$description: Proteus borders & focus ring — stroke widths (mode-agnostic). Border COLORS live in the semantic tokens (border, border-heavy, input, ring); this file is widths only.

thin.$description: Default hairline for dividers, cards, inputs.

width.$description: Focus ring uses the semantic `ring` color (brand) at this width.

offset.$description: Gap between the element and its ring so it reads clearly on the dark base.
